name: Classic Fudge Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 9 x 13 x 2-inch baking pan.
3. Melt the chocolate in the top of a double boiler and set aside.
4. Mix the sugars, corn syrup, and butter together in a large bowl; do not cream.
5. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
6. Slowly pour in the melted chocolate, blending until smooth.
7. Gradually add the flour, beating until the mixture is smooth.
8. Fold in the chopped walnuts.
9. Spread the batter evenly in the prepared pan.
10. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes.
11. Remove from the oven and place on a wire rack to cool completely before cutting into squares.
Yield: 24 Brownies
